data.title: ECD Automotive Design showcases modern potential of classic Series vehicles with Project Inizio, re-defining mechanical purity.
data.description: Inizio Project highlights the contemporary and personalized possibilities of the Series platform, emphasizing its focus on mechanical simplicity and efficiency.

data.title: Mavik surpasses target, closes second fund at $685 million, exceeding $515 million goal. US market sees strong performance.
data.description: Mavik, a credit-focused investment firm specializing in special situations commercial real estate and hard assets in North America, has completed the fundraising for its second closed-end fund, Mavik Real Estate Special Opportunities VS2. The Fund closed with an impressive $685 million in total commitments, surpassing its initial target of $515 million. This success underscores Mavik's solid track record and the attractive opportunities present in the market as the U.S. economy progresses.

data.title: Tortoise Capital launches TMLP ETF, providing tax-efficient access to 100% MLP exposure.
data.description: Tortoise Capital, based in Overland Park, Kansas, has recently introduced the TMLP ETF. Leveraging their extensive expertise accumulated over many years, the ETF offers investors access to Master Limited Partnerships (MLPs) without the restrictions associated with older investment products.

data.title: Oliver Winery, a top 30 winery in the US, achieves national expansion, innovative growth, more talent, & top-tier recognition.
data.description: In Bloomington, Indiana, on December 23, 2025, Oliver Winery disclosed significant achievements in the past year. It has been recognized as one of the top 30 wineries in the US. The winery experienced notable progress with increased national expansion, groundbreaking advancements, a considerable expansion in retail presence, and ongoing acknowledgments as a leading wine producer in the country.

data.title: PerfectVape launches loyalty program giving special discounts & rewards to loyal customers. Dec. 23, 2025. #vaping #loyaltyprogram
data.description: In a press release on December 23, 2025, PerfectVape, a prominent player in the vaping sector, unveiled the introduction of its highly anticipated customer loyalty program. This new program aimed at expressing appreciation to their loyal customer base offers exclusive benefits and rewards. PerfectVape's initiative signifies their commitment to enhancing customer experience and fostering lasting relationships in the industry.

data.title: Shift5 is recognized as a technology innovation leader for transforming operational data. Shift5's platform works with America's defense and transportation systems.
data.description: Shift5, a company based in Arlington, Virginia, has been acknowledged by an analyst firm for its expertise in converting obscure operational data into useful information. The firm specializes in providing an Operational Intelligence platform for the defense and transportation sectors in America. The recognition was announced on December 23, 2025, and highlights Shift5's leadership role in this field for the year 2025.

data.title: Siranogroup launches unified multi-asset investment platform in Paris, offering streamlined access to global markets.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Siranogroup revealed the debut of its new integrated investment platform, offering a simplified method for engaging with worldwide financial markets within one centralized system. This platform facilitates CFD trading across multiple markets, providing users with comprehensive access to diverse investment opportunities.

data.title: Skreed introduces 240 shades for 35 phone models, redefining phone accessories with diverse colors.
data.description: A renowned premium brand is setting new standards in the industry by providing an unparalleled range of color options for 35 models of smartphones, including the iPhone, Samsung Galaxy, and Google Pixel. This groundbreaking initiative allows consumers to choose from a diverse selection of colors to reflect their personal style preferences. The announcement was made in Dayton, N.J. on December 23, 2025. Skreed is leading the charge in offering customers a wide array of color choices for their devices, marking a significant shift towards greater customization and individual expression.

data.title: CNT Foundations in Charleston, SC offers financing options to help homeowners afford foundation repairs, making them more accessible in South Carolina.
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina on December 23, 2025, CNT Foundations revealed new financing opportunities for residents. As a reputable foundation repair and crawl space contractor in the Southeast, the company aims to enhance access to crucial foundation repairs and home upgrades. This move is part of their commitment to serve the community effectively by offering flexible payment plans.

data.title: IAS, a global media platform, acquired by Novacap in all-cash deal; deal value undisclosed.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Integral Ad Science, a prominent global media measurement and optimization platform, revealed the finalization of its acquisition by Novacap, a top North American private equity company. The acquisition was completed through an all-cash deal that assessed Integral Ad Science at a significant value.

data.title: LIS Tech gets TN license for radioactive material at Oak Ridge; approved for uranium enrichment R&D with UF₆.
data.description: LIS Technologies has received approval to move forward with acquiring uranium hexafluoride (UF₆) feedstock and to progress in its research, development, and optimization efforts on its patented laser uranium enrichment technology of U.S. origin.

data.title: Datacentrex reports 48% quarter-over-quarter gross profit growth to $1.45M; revenue up 27%.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Carson City, Nevada, Datacentrex, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTCX), a tech-focused company, shared the unaudited performance results of its new wholly-owned subsidiary Dogehash Technologies, Inc. The third quarter of 2025 saw a notable 48% rise in gross profit to $1,450,986 from $977,066 compared to the previous quarter ending on September 30, 2025. This growth in profit was primarily due to increased digital asset mining capabilities and advantageous Dogecoin prices during that period.

data.title: AS Ekspress Grupp sells 100% shareholding in UAB Lrytas to UAB Admisa as per agreement on 23 December 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, AS Ekspress Grupp finalized a sale and purchase deal with UAB Admisa. The agreement involves the sale of AS Ekspress Grupp's entire 100% ownership in UAB Lrytas (registration code 300781534) to the Lithuanian company, UAB Admisa.

data.title: Pledge Software launches Nonprofit Check Plus API for easier nonprofit verification. aim to reduce friction for platforms.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Dallas, Pledge Software revealed a new feature for its Nonprofit Check Plus API, known as automated developer onboarding. The aim of this update is to streamline the process for platforms needing to confirm the authenticity of nonprofits, especially in light of increased federal scrutiny. Pledge Software, the company behind Pactman (www.pactman.org), introduced this development to simplify the verification process.

data.title: Raytheon awarded $1.7B contract to deliver 4 Patriot units to Spain, Spain's largest order ever.
data.description: In an unprecedented deal, Raytheon, a subsidiary of RTX (NYSE: RTX), has secured its largest Patriot order in Spain's history. The contract, valued at $1.7 billion, involves the supply of four Patriot® air and missile defense systems to the Spanish military. The foreign military sales agreement signifies a significant milestone for Raytheon and demonstrates the growing demand for advanced defense systems worldwide.
Canada's November GDP likely rose 0.1% MoM - StatCan flash

data.title: NYSE Group announces holiday and early closing dates for 2026-2028 for its equity markets, including NYSE, NYSE American, and NYSE Arca.
data.description: NYSE Group, a division of Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider, unveiled the holiday calendar and early closing dates for its cash equity markets for the years 2026, 2027, and 2028. The markets covered include New York Stock Exchange, NYSE American Equities, NYSE Arca Equities, NYSE National, and NYSE Texas, along with NYSE American Options, NYSE Arca Options, and NYSE Bonds markets. This information is crucial for investors and traders planning their activities, with clear schedules for market closures and early closing days in the future.

data.title: Irondequoit, NY is the most competitive housing market in the U.S., with homes selling in 8.5 days on average.
data.description: In a recent report by real estate brokerage Redfin, it was revealed that Irondequoit, NY, a suburb of Rochester, has been identified as the most competitive housing market in the United States. Properties in this lakeside town tend to sell incredibly fast, with an average of just 8.5 days on the market, and often fetch prices well above their initial asking price. Following closely behind Irondequoit are Sunnyvale, CA, Santa Clara, CA, Tonawanda Town, NY (a Buffalo suburb), and Mountain View, CA. Interestingly, California dominated the list with four cities in the top 10, while three were from Western New York.

data.title: Pusan National University researchers find new photolithography method for high-res quantum dot displays.
data.description: A new nondestructive photolithography technique has been uncovered by researchers in Busan, South Korea, on December 23, 2025. This method provides a universal approach for quantum dot patterning, essential for enhancing the resolution of next-generation displays. Colloidal quantum dot (QD) light-emitting diodes show significant promise for applications in displays due to their high performance. This breakthrough offers a viable solution for achieving precise patterning needed for advanced displays.

data.title: DevvStream (Nasdaq: DEVS) to hold virtual Annual Meeting on Dec 29, 2025 at 10am PT, to discuss proposed business combination with Southern Energy Renewables.
data.description: DevvStream Corp. (Nasdaq: DEVS), a prominent carbon management and environmental-asset monetization company, is set to host its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Monday, December 29, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. PT. The meeting will be held online. Besides regular agenda points, DevvStream's management intends to present shareholders with details regarding the recently revealed proposed business merger.
